name: lukeslp-team
description: Council-style codebase-to-pitch plugin: a 12-seat team takes your code and tells you what to sell, who to sell it to, and what will kill it

plugins.name: team
plugins.description: Council-style product/business pitch from a codebase. 4 subcommittees (research, business, technical, skeptics) feed an executive chair. Optional consultant fan-out to external models.
